'''Thrasher''' was [[Oron Kira]]'s personal [[drexl]] which he took to [[Empress Teta/Legends|Empress Teta]] in an attempt to rescue [[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|Ulic Qel-Droma]]. The [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] tried to force Ulic onto Thrasher, but [[Nomi Sunrider]] forbid it.

==Appearances==
*[[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 6|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 6]] {{1st}}
